reportincident-dialog-something-else-emp: Fadlan bixi sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan dhaqanka.
reportincident-submit-emergency-dialog-t: {{GENDER:|Mahadsanid}} inaad qaaday tallaabooyin lagu hagaajinayo amniga iyo ka mid noqoshada {{SITENAME}}.
communityconfiguration-reportincident-re: Warbixin toos ah oo iimayl ah

Warbixinta tooska ah waxay soo bandhigtaa foom uu isticmaalehu buuxin karo si uu u soo gudbiyo fariin. Sida caadiga ah fariintan waxaa loo diri doonaa stewards-oversight@wikimedia.org. Haddii aad rabto in fariimahan loo diro ciwaan iimayl oo kale, ku dar hoos goobtaas.
reportincident-nonemergency-other-notice: Haddii warbixintaadu ay ka kooban tahay xog xasaasi ah ama gaar ah, fadlan ku dir oo keliya iimayl.
communityconfiguration-reportincident-in: Qodobka raadinta '$1' waa inuu leeyahay qiime
reportincident-nonemergency-directreport: Haddii aad rabto inaad si toos ah uga warbixiso arrintan maamulayaasha bulshada, fadlan buuxi foomka hoose.
Magacaaga isticmaalaha iyo ciwaanka iimaylka waxaa loo diri doonaa maamulayaasha bulshada.
Warbixinta waa la gudbiyay si loo eego. Codsigaaga waxaa dib u eegi doona maamulayaasha bulshada.

Warbixintaada waxaa loo gudbiyay maamulayaasha bulshada.

Maamulayaasha bulshada ayaa dib u eegi doona oo go’aamin doona in dhacdadu jabinayso siyaasadaha.
reportincident-directreport-email-subjec: Nidaamka Warbixinta Dhacdooyinka – warbixin toos ah oo aan degdeg ahayn
reportincident-directreport-email-body:
Isticmaalaha warbixinta gudbinaya: $1
Isticmaalaha la warbixinayo: $2
$3: $4

Nooca dabeecadda aan la aqbali karin ee isticmaalaha: $5
Faahfaahin: $6

Jawaab u dir isticmaalaha warbixinta gudbiyay: $7
reportincident-directreport-send-error: Lama abuuri karo warbixintaada dhacdada. Haddii dhibaatadu sii socoto, fadlan iimayl u dir $1 adigoo ku lifaaqaya {{GENDER:|warbixintaada dhacdada}}.
reportincident-directreport-featuredisab: Lama abuuri karo warbixintaada dhacdada. Warbixin toos ah waa la damiyay.
